summary: The ETH request serving divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in header, body, and receipt loop exits; no request serving behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 160: M	crates/net/network/src/eth_requests.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to early `return headers` and `break` statements in header, body, and receipt serving loops.
No block lookup, skip/direction logic, soft response limit, max serve limit, body retrieval, or receipt retrieval behavior changed.
